full_text:
Zhou Huan (Wenming) 周奐 (文明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Huan (周奐), styledWenming (文明), was born in Youfufeng. Part of Wang Yun’s government, killed by Li Jue and Guo Si’s troops. Zhou Huan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhou Huan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
